seo.headline: AlmaDrive — car rentals and transfers in Almaty and across Kazakhstan
seo.p1: AlmaDrive provides car rental and transfer services for private clients, tourists, and corporate customers.
seo.p2: We operate in Almaty and across Kazakhstan, ensuring comfortable and reliable trips for any scenario.

footer.description: Premium chauffeur transfer service. Comfort and style in every trip.

meta.title: Premium Transfer Almaty | AlmaDrive
meta.description: AlmaDrive — premium chauffeur transfer service in Almaty and across Kazakhstan. Comfort, safety, and punctuality.
meta.keywords: Almaty transfer, premium transfer, chauffeur service, Almaty airport transfer, business transfer

services.title: Services
services.subtitle: Choose the trip format — we’ll adapt to your needs

airport.title: Airport transfer
airport.text: We provide a comfortable transfer from and to the airport by business and premium class cars. The driver will meet you at the arrival area, help you with your luggage, and ensure a quick and safe trip to your destination. Punctuality, high level of service and convenience make every trip as comfortable as possible.

hourly.title: Hourly chauffeured service
hourly.text: We offer an hourly car rental service with a professional driver for business meetings, events and personal trips around the city. You get a comfortable business or premium class car and the opportunity to freely plan your route. Our driver will ensure a safe and timely trip so that you can focus on your business.

intercity.title: Intercity trips across Kazakhstan
intercity.text: We offer comfortable long-distance trips around Kazakhstan in business and premium class cars with professional drivers. Regardless of the distance, you will be able to travel safely and with maximum convenience. We provide timely pick-up of the car, a high level of service and flexible travel conditions for business and personal routes.

events.title: Event transportation
events.text: Transport for weddings, conferences, and events: on-time pickup, coordination, multiple cars.

delegations.title: Delegation service
delegations.text: We provide high-quality transportation of guests at events: conferences, business meetings, corporate events, car selection for the event status, flexible rental conditions

tours.title: Tours and excursions
tours.text: We organize comfortable tourist trips and individual excursions to the picturesque places of Kazakhstan. Our business and premium class cars allow you to travel with maximum convenience, enjoying nature and the sights of the region. Professional drivers will help you plan your route and ensure a safe and enjoyable trip. You can visit nature parks, mountain locations, historical sites, and popular tourist destinations without worrying about roads and transportation.
